data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and docs for centrality-aware test gate
data.description:
## Description
Update project documentation to reflect the centrality-aware test gate feature:
1. Update CLAUDE.md with new config keys (test_gate.import_pattern.<lang>, test_gate.file_count_threshold, test_gate.centrality_threshold)
2. Document the centrality scoring behavior, caching, and JSONL logging
3. Document the graceful degradation when ast-grep is not installed

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify — add centrality config key documentation)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions test_gate.import_pattern
  Verify: grep -q 'test_gate.import_pattern' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions test_gate.file_count_threshold
  Verify: grep -q 'test_gate.file_count_threshold' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions centrality-log.jsonl
  Verify: grep -q 'centrality-log.jsonl' CLAUDE.md
